name: io.github.aliasunder/vault-cortex
title: vault-cortex
description: Remote MCP server for Obsidian vaults — search, memory, link graph, 23 tools, OAuth-protected.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for MCP client authentication. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (mounted into the container)

environmentVariables.name: PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public URL for OAuth discovery metadata. Required for remote deployments with OAuth.

environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Vault folder for structured memory files

environmentVariables.name: TZ
environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone for timestamps and daily note resolution
